entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 5 Matches Opus Performance at Half the Price
entry.summary: Claude Sonnet 5 launches as the new default on Free and Pro plans, matching Opus 4.8 performance at Sonnet pricing with stronger agentic autonomy

entry.title: Lovable Ships Auto-Monitoring So Your App Stops Breaking Silently in Production
entry.summary: Lovable adds scheduled app monitoring that alerts you when something breaks or fails silently, before your users notice

entry.title: OpenAI's GeneBench-Pro Exposes That Top AI Fails Real Biology 70% of the Time
entry.summary: OpenAI's new GeneBench-Pro tests whether AI agents can handle the messy judgment calls of real computational biology research â and current models solve fewer than a third of problems.

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Science Collapses 60+ Research Tools Into One Desktop App
entry.summary: Anthropic launches Claude Science, a dedicated AI research workbench with 60+ scientific databases, compute orchestration, and full reproducibility for every result

entry.title: OpenAI Hunted a Rockset Bug and Found an 18-Year-Old Race Condition
entry.summary: OpenAI engineers hunted mysterious C++ crashes for a year, uncovering a hardware fault and an 18-year-old race condition hiding in GNU libunwind.

entry.title: Anthropic Finally Ships Claude Desktop for Linux, Ending Community Workarounds
entry.summary: Anthropic officially ships Claude Desktop for Ubuntu and Debian, closing a gap that had pushed Linux users toward unofficial community builds

entry.title: Google's NotebookLM Turns Any Document Into a 60-Second Vertical Video
entry.summary: NotebookLM's new Short Video Overviews turn any document into a 60-second vertical explainer, powered by Google's fastest new image model.

entry.title: Nous Research's Hermes Agent Browses the Web 60x Faster and 49x Cheaper
entry.summary: Hermes Agent's web extraction is now up to 60x faster and 49x cheaper, thanks to smarter scraping backends and on-demand page paging.

entry.title: Figure AI's Figure 03 Robot Starts Real BMW Factory Work With 99% Accuracy
entry.summary: Figure 03 is now performing live logistics sequencing at BMW's Spartanburg plant, marking the next chapter in the most-watched humanoid robot deployment in manufacturing history.

entry.title: LiquidAI's IFStruct Trains a 350M Model to Beat 4B Rivals at Structured Output
entry.summary: Liquid AI's new open benchmark tests structured output compliance under realistic, messy prompts â and a 350M model trained on it beats models 10x its size

entry.title: Alibaba's HydraHead Cuts Transformer Memory 65% by Mixing Attention Heads
entry.summary: Researchers from Alibaba Group show that hybridizing attention at the head level â guided by mechanistic interpretability â unlocks 512K context with only 15B training tokens

entry.title: Runway Brings ByteDance's Seed Audio 1.0 to Generate Full Cinematic Soundscapes
entry.summary: ByteDance's Seed Audio 1.0 lands on Runway, letting paid users generate up to 2 minutes of mixed dialogue, music, and sound effects from a single text prompt.
